features_subtitle: We break the boundaries of traditional banking, placing convenience and security first
feature_1_desc: Your funds and data are protected by advanced biometric and end-to-end encryption systems.
feature_2_desc: Make interbank and international money transfers instantly, without paperwork, at the lowest rates.
feature_3_desc: Earn up to 10% real cashback for every purchase with our card across our extensive partner network.

testi_subtitle: Here is what our regular users say about their digital banking experience
testi_1_text: "Hayot Bank mobile app works extremely fast. I received my loan in just 5 minutes straight to my card. The design and security are outstanding!"
testi_2_text: "I opened a savings deposit with a very favorable interest rate. Plus, I get great monthly cashback bonuses. Highly recommend to everyone!"
faq_subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our banking services
faq_1_q: How can I order Hayot Bank cards?
faq_1_a: Register in the Hayot Bank app, select your card type, and place an order. We deliver cards within 24 hours in Tashkent completely free. Regional deliveries take 2-3 business days.
faq_2_q: What documents are required to get a loan?
faq_2_a: Our loan application is completely online and unsecured. You only need a passport or ID card and verification of active income (all checked automatically inside the app). No paperwork or queues.
faq_3_q: What are the terms of opening a deposit?
faq_3_a: You can open a deposit online starting from 500,000 UZS. The annual interest rate reaches up to 24% depending on the term. Interest is paid monthly to your card.
faq_4_q: What is the fee for card transfers?
faq_4_a: Money transfers between Hayot Bank cards are completely 0% commission. For transfers to other bank cards (Uzcard/Humo), it is 0% up to 5 million UZS per month, and only 0.3% beyond that.
footer_about: Secure and smart banking services for life. Licensed by the Central Bank of the Republic of Uzbekistan, License No. 254.
footer_subscribe_desc: Don't miss our latest promotions and beneficial banking offers
testi_3_text: "The free card delivery was very convenient. The mobile app design is truly modern and elegant!"
testi_4_text: "Commission-free transfers are perfect for students! And cashback is a nice extra incentive."
